Music Listening Habits

How did my music listening sessions vary across the week and across different activities?

Data was collected across 41 observations

Music listening sessions were most prevalent during studying and walking, especially at the start of the week, on Mondays and Tuesdays. Studying had the most listening sessions, with frequent listening on every day of the week. In comparison, activities such as bus rides and playing card games had few listening sessions. This suggests that I listen to music most during routine activities, particularly at the start of the week.

Does my listening time differ much depending on what I am doing?

Horizontal boxplot of listening time (minutes) by activity. Art and study have the greatest listening times card games and walking have the lowest.

Study and art had the longest listening times. This suggests that I often listen to music for longer when I am focused on studying or doing creative activities. This makes sense as time often flies by when studying and doing art. Walking and playing card games had shorter listening times, which makes sense because my walks to and from campus are often very short.

Did listening time change a lot depending on the time of day?

Column plot of average listening time by time of day. X-axis is ordered from lowest to highest average listening time. Morning listening time is lowers followed by afternoon and Evening.

Average listening time was greatest in the evening. This was quite a noticeable difference compared with the morning and afternoon. This makes sense because I often study and do art in the evenings when I don’t have lectures, and these are activities where I usually listen to music for longer periods.

In conclusion

Overall, my data showed that both the type of activity and the time of day influenced my music-listening habits. I listened to music most often during regular weekly activities such as studying and walking, especially at the start of the week. My listening time was longest during art and studying, suggesting I listen to music longer when I’m focused on an activity. In addition, my listening time was greatest in the evening, likely because this is when I spend more time studying or doing art.
